item.title: How '123456' Helped Hack McDonald's
item.author: Seytonic
item.content:encoded:
0:00 Intro 0:14 Hacked With '123456' 4:06 Why Selling Your Password is a Bad Idea 6:07 Spyware App Pwned
Sources: https://ian.sh/mcdonalds https://www.paradox.ai/legal/security
https://t.me/investigations/263 https://g1.globo.com/sp/sao-paulo/noticia/2025/07/04/ataque-hacker-quem-e-suspeito-de-entregar-acesso-ao-sistema-que-liga-bancos-do-pix.ghtml https://www.reuters.com/world/americas/brazils-cm-software-hit-by-cyberattack-central-bank-says-2025-07-02/
https://ericdaigle.ca/posts/taking-over-60k-spyware-user-accounts/ https://techcrunch.com/2025/07/02/data-breach-reveals-catwatchful-stalkerware-spying-on-thousands-android-phones/ =============================================== My Website: https://www.seytonic.com/ Follow me on TWTR: https://twitter.com/seytonic Follow me on INSTA: https://www.instagram.com/jhonti/ ===============================================
